'''Pelles''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed the [[Torch Nebula/Legends|Torch Nebula]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Pelles was critical of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Abran Balfour/Legends|Abran Balfour's]] stewardship of the [[Parmic sector/Legends|Parmic sector]].
